# llms.txt for brisbane-renovation-services

This page is an independent T2 cloudlink node in a chain structure.

## Primary link
- Links to T1: https://brisbane-renovation-guide.netlify.app (brisbanerenovation-001)

## Context
- Node role: buffer
- Money target: brisbanerenovation.com.au (T1 links to money, this T2 does not)
- Tier: T2
- Structure: chain
